summary: Tested zip code lookup API and onboarding flows. Fixed a bug where frontend was calling /api/api/lookup/zipcode (duplicate /api prefix). All features now working: zip code lookup returns city/state, doula and midwife onboarding screens show location lookup results, and birth plan form displays birth location icons.
seed_data_creation: Created test accounts for doula, midwife, and mom roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zip code lookup feature is working. The API uses Zippopotam.us external service. Frontend was fixed to use /lookup/zipcode instead of /api/lookup/zipcode (avoiding duplicate /api prefix). Birth location icons in BirthPlanForms.tsx display correctly with Hospital, Birth Center, Home Birth, and Not sure yet options in a 2x2 grid.

doula_onboarding_zip_lookup.description: Doula onboarding page shows Location section with zip code input. When user enters 5-digit zip code, city and state are automatically populated with green checkmark.

midwife_onboarding_zip_lookup.description: Midwife onboarding page shows Location section with zip code input. When user enters 5-digit zip code, city and state are automatically populated with green checkmark.

birth_plan_location_icons.description: Birth Plan 'About Me & My Preferences' section shows birth location options with icons in a 2x2 grid

bug_fixed.root_cause: The apiRequest function in frontend already prepends /api to all endpoints, but doula-onboarding.tsx and midwife-onboarding.tsx were calling apiRequest with /api/lookup/zipcode path, causing duplicate /api prefix
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed from apiRequest(`/api/lookup/zipcode/${zip}`) to apiRequest(`/lookup/zipcode/${zip}`) in both files
